prestazioni: Engine: EJ257 (closed-deck, semi-forged internals) with upgraded IAG Stage 3 Competition Series pistons (9.5:1 CR) and Manley Turbo Tuff H-beam connecting rods, paired with a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor wheel) for 450whp on E85 with a 22psi peak boost target, managed via Cobb Accessport v3 with a custom ProTune map optimized for 3000-7000 RPM powerband.

Drivetrain: STI 6-speed manual transmission reinforced with a PPG Stage 3 gearset (1st: 3.083, 2nd: 2.062, 3rd: 1.545, 4th: 1.151, 5th: 0.825, 6th: 0.672) and a Cusco Type-RS 2-way limited-slip differential (45/75% torque split), coupled with a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily twin-disc clutch (2400lb pressure plate) and a Fidanza 1.5kg aluminum flywheel for rapid rev matching.

Suspension/Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable compression, 16-way rebound, 20mm front/18mm rear adjustable camber plates) with Cusco front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear, 3-way adjustable), Whiteline front and rear subframe lockout kits, and STI-spec Brembo 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake calipers with DBA 5000 Series rotors (355mm front, 330mm rear) and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid for fade resistance.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, rear diffuser, and GT-style rear wing) with a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and red pinstriping, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (vented, 3.5kg weight reduction) and a Cusco rear roof spoiler for high-speed stability.

Wheels/Tires: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2-piece forged wheels (18x9.5 +38 front, 18x10.5 +40 rear) in Hyper Silver with Toyo R888R tires (265/35/18 front, 285/35/18 rear) for aggressive stance and grip, mounted on STI-spec wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) for flush fitment.

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) with Takata 4-point harnesses, a Cusco bolt-in roll cage (8-point, chromoly steel, powder-coated red), and a custom STI-themed Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (suede, 350mm diameter) paired with a NRG quick-release hub. Full interior stripped and sound deadened with Dynamat Extreme, then reupholstered in Alcantara with red stitching and a custom STI logo embroidered on the headrests.
